title: Bell bell_star_dlx_mips_solid-tc-3

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with EPS Liner

technical_analysis: The Bell Star DLX MIPS Solid TC-3 utilizes a proprietary carbon fiber composite shell architecture designed to maximize impact absorption while minimizing overall mass. Integrated with the Multi-directional Impact Protection System (MIPS), the helmet features a low-friction slip plane that allows the head to rotate slightly upon oblique impacts, reducing rotational forces transmitted to the brain. The internal EPS liner is engineered with variable density zones to optimize energy dissipation across different impact vectors.
marketing_description: Experience the pinnacle of performance and style with the Bell Star DLX MIPS Solid TC-3, a full-face helmet crafted for riders who demand uncompromising protection without sacrificing aerodynamics. Featuring a sleek solid color finish and advanced carbon fiber construction, this helmet delivers an exceptional balance of lightweight agility and robust safety standards.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Bell Star DLX MIPS Solid TC-3: a lightweight, DOT & ECE certified full-face motorcycle helmet featuring MIPS technology, carbon fiber shell, and superior ventilation for ultimate riding performance.
